{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Queen of Karosha
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Captain]] is the exiled [[Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Queen of Karosha]] is in control of a vessel or station with controls.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“...the Captain of The Last Horizon, the exiled Queen of Karosha, and the Fallen Sword are the ones raiding their prison.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
